zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Richard ap Howel of Mostyn於1470年出生在威爾士丹比爾利朗勒時，他的父親Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan"33歲，母親Margaret Verch Gruffydd31歲。他於大約1492年與Lady Ellen Wreicht在英國巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1540年2月7日在威爾士福林爾莫斯廷享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Richard ap Howel of Mostyn于1470年出生在威尔士丹比爾利朗勒时，他的父亲Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan"33岁，母亲Margaret Verch Gruffydd31岁。他于大约1492年与Lady Ellen Wreicht在英国巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1540年2月7日在威尔士福林爾莫斯廷享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Howel
meanings: The English form of the Welsh name Hywel.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Richard ap Howel of Mostyn was born in 1470, in Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wales, his father, Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan", was 33 and his mother, Margaret Verch Gruffydd, was 31. He married Lady Ellen Wreicht about 1492, in Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 7 February 1540, in Mostyn, Flintshire, Wales, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Richard ap Howel of Mostyn est né en 1470, à Llangollen, Denbighshire, Galles, son père, Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan", avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret Verch Gruffydd, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Lady Ellen Wreicht environ 1492, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 7 février 1540, à Mostyn, Flintshire, Galles, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Richard ap Howel of Mostyn 1470 in Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan" 33 und seine Mutter Margaret Verch Gruffydd 31. Er hat um 1492 in Buckinghamshire, England Lady Ellen Wreicht geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Februar 1540 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Mostyn, Flintshire, Wales.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Richard ap Howel of Mostynが1470年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアランゴレンで生まれた時，父Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan"は33歳，母Margaret Verch Gruffyddは31歳であった。約1492年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでLady Ellen Wreichtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1540年2月7日にウェールズフリントシュアイアモストインで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Richard ap Howel of Mostyn(이)가 1470년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랭렌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan"(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Verch Gruffydd(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1492년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 Lady Ellen Wreicht(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1540년 2월 7일 웨일스 플린츠히르 모스틴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Richard ap Howel of Mostyn nasceu em 1470, em Llangollen, Denbighshire, Gales, seu pai, Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan", tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Verch Gruffydd, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Ellen Wreicht aproximadamente 1492, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1540, em Mostyn, Flintshire, Gales, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Richard ap Howel of Mostyn родился в 1470 г. в местности лланголлен, денбаишир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan" было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Verch Gruffydd, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Ellen Wreicht около 1492 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 7 февраля 1540 г. в местности мустин, флинцхир, Уэльс в возрасте 70 лет.

Se casó con Lady Ellen Wreicht aproximadamente 1492, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 7 de febrero de 1540, en Mostyn, Flintshire, Gales, a la edad de 70 años.
